name: xf_cep_pn_annihilation_set
drl: rule NE when not D() P() then end
_finding: D-158 residual -> D-159 FIXED (graduated): a same-epoch explicit plain-D insert+delete pair over `not D() P()` in a STREAM session. Drools stages plain not-blocker ops until a network eval - TupleSets addDelete ANNIHILATES the still-staged insert, so the not never blocks and nothing re-fires (6 firings). The engine used to stream-flush the D insert per-arrival (block at the insert, release at the fire) and re-fired the whole join memory (12). Fix: stream_flush_ex's stash loop hides staged right-ins at PLAIN-typed Kind::Not nodes (event blockers keep the certified D-102 visibility); the staged ins then meets the deferred del at the fire eval and Staged::add_del annihilates natively. Spec: predict_pflush (unchanged - it already predicted this cell).
